title: Potential bug in Combine `calculate_pulls.py` for pull definition `unconstPullAsym`

posts.name: Robert Stephen White
posts.text:
*** Discussion title: Higgs Combination
Hey,
I've recently been calculating pulls with the `diffNuisances.py` module,
and trying different `--pullDef` options. One of these,
`unconstPullAsym`, returns an error `NameError: global name 'relDiff' is
not defined`. Based on the code, the `relDiff` function is missing but
there is a `relDiffAsymErrors`, see here:

github.com

cms-analysis/HiggsAnalysis-CombinedLimit/blob/7bffa8b8758a5dc6824b8b93c098ce9afb1c32a4/python/calculate_pulls.py#L45

return ret

def diffPullAsym(x,x0,sxu,sxu0,sxd,sxd0):
# as defined in http://physics.rockefeller.edu/luc/technical_reports/cdf5776_pulls.pdf
if x > x0 : ret = diffPull(x,x0,sxd,sxd0)
else : ret =  diffPull(x,x0,sxu,sxu0)
ret.append(ret[-1])
return ret

def unconstPullAsym(x,x0,sxu,sxu0,sxd,sxd0):
if x<x0: ret = relDiff(x,x0,sxu)
else :  ret =  relDiff(x,x0,sxd)
return ret

def relDiffAsymErrs(x,x0,sxu,sxu0,sxd,sxd0):
pull = x - x0
pull = (pull/sxu0) if pull >= 0 else (pull/sxd0)
pull_hi = x+sxu - x0
pull_hi = (pull_hi/sxu0) if pull_hi >= 0 else (pull_hi/sxd0)
pull_hi = pull_hi - pull
pull_lo = x-sxd -x0

I'm pretty confident this is a bug and not an issue with our pulls, I
wondered if anyone had any knowledge/advice for this?
Rob

*** Discussion title: Higgs Combination

Hey,

I've recently been calculating pulls with the `diffNuisances.py` module,
and trying different `--pullDef` options. One of these,
`unconstPullAsym`, returns an error `NameError: global name 'relDiff' is
not defined`. Based on the code, the `relDiff` function is missing but
there is a `relDiffAsymErrors`, see here:

github.com

cms-analysis/HiggsAnalysis-CombinedLimit/blob/7bffa8b8758a5dc6824b8b93c098ce9afb1c32a4/python/calculate_pulls.py#L45

I'm pretty confident this is a bug and not an issue with our pulls, I

posts.name: Adinda de Wit
posts.text:
*** Discussion title: Higgs Combination
Hi Rob,
You're right, this looks like a bug in the script. I think to get
results for that method you'll need to replace the two instances of
relDiff in L45-46 with unconstPull [*]. Thanks for flagging it up, we'll
fix this in a future combine release.
Best,
Adinda
[*]
https://github.com/cms-analysis/HiggsAnalysis-CombinedLimit/blob/102x/python/calculate_pulls.py#L9
